case_title: SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC VS. LUDMILA V VOLOVNIKOV et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $378.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VOLOVNIKOV, LUDMILA V

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SECURITY CREDIT SERVICES LLC
